headline: Qualcomm Surges 12%, Skyworks Rallies 9%, Qorvo Rises 7%: The Mobile Chip Trade Picks Smaller Winners
summary: Shares of Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) are up 11% at midday Friday, with Skyworks Solutions (NASDAQ:SWKS) higher by 9% and Qorvo (NASDAQ:QRVO) tacking on 7%. The mobile and RF (radio frequency) chip trade is rallying broadly, but the bid is concentrated in the smaller, more focused names in the group. Investors are picking pure-play winners while passing ... Qualcomm Surges 12%, Skyworks Rallies 9%, Qorvo Rises 7%: The Mobile Chip Trade Picks Smaller Winners

headline: Shares of semiconductor companies are trading lower amid overall market weakness as investors rotate out of the industry. Recent payroll economic data may impact future rate cuts as investors await Friday's CPI results.
